productDisplayName: Puma Men Aqua Cat II Power Red Flip Flops
description: For those who don't want the hassle of tying laces, chill out in style and revel in comfort with these funky black flip flops from puma. With their textured footbed and strong grippy outsole, the journey in this footwear will be an assuredly awesome one.UpperMoulded synthetic design complete with a single strap over the top of the foot for a comfortable Fitpuma logo printed to the strapSynthetic upper, inner and soleMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfortFull-length EVA footbed with circular nubs along the length of the footbed and forefoot, with longer lugs along the sides from the midfoot to the heel for massaged comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multi directional wave-like grooves and Puma logo embossed above the heel for maximum suction, grip and tractionFlip flop careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
